company.name: IRH Global Trading & Investment
company.tagline: A globally integrated commodity trading and investment platform
company.overview: IRH is a diversified commodity trading, investment, and structured finance group operating across energy, metals, and agricultural markets. IRH combines physical trading expertise with capital allocation and origination capabilities to serve producers, consumers, financial institutions, and governments worldwide.

commodities.name: LNG
commodities.description: Origination, offtake, and trading of liquefied natural gas cargoes across Atlantic and Pacific basins.

commodities.name: Copper
commodities.description: Physical trading and structured offtake of copper concentrate, cathode, and refined products.

commodities.name: Crude & Products
commodities.description: Global crude oil and refined products trading, blending, and logistics.

commodities.name: Iron Ore
commodities.description: Sourcing and trading of iron ore fines, lump, and pellets for steel producers.

commodities.name: Uranium
commodities.description: Uranium trading and structured supply arrangements for nuclear fuel cycle participants.

commodities.name: Lithium
commodities.description: Trading and offtake solutions for lithium chemicals supporting the battery and EV supply chain.

commodities.name: Agri and Soft Products
commodities.description: Trading of grains, oilseeds, sugar, and other soft commodities.

investment_strategy: IRH allocates capital across the commodity value chain, pairing physical trading flows with strategic equity, structured debt, and infrastructure investments. The strategy prioritizes long-term partnerships in supply-constrained or supply-critical commodities, integration between origination and logistics, and disciplined risk management across price, credit, and counterparty exposure.

global_operations.detail: Group headquarters in Abu Dhabi, UAE, covering origination, trading, and structuring.
Offices supporting mining, agriculture, and energy origination across key producing countries.
Trading and offtake relationships across major consuming markets.
Structured finance and risk management desks.

financing_solutions: Origination and structuring for producers and off-takers

faq.a_hint: List commodities from the commodities section.

faq.q: What financing solutions does IRH provide?
